# Skills by Matt Pocock

**Author:** [Matt Pocock](https://github.com/mattpocock)
**Source:** [mattpocock/skills](https://github.com/mattpocock/skills)
**License:** See original repository

These skills are from Matt Pocock's "Skills for Real Engineers" collection. They provide general-purpose development workflow capabilities including TDD, domain modeling, issue creation, and codebase architecture analysis.

## Skills

| Skill | Original Path | Description |
|-------|--------------|-------------|
| `caveman` | `skills/productivity/caveman` | Ultra-compressed communication mode (~75% token reduction) |
| `tdd` | `skills/engineering/tdd` | Test-driven development with vertical-slice red-green-refactor |
| `grill-with-docs` | `skills/engineering/grill-with-docs` | Domain model stress-testing with CONTEXT.md and ADR updates |
| `to-issues` | `skills/engineering/to-issues` | Break plans into vertical-slice GitHub issues |
| `to-prd` | `skills/engineering/to-prd` | Synthesize conversation context into a PRD |
| `write-a-skill` | `skills/productivity/write-a-skill` | Skill authoring with proper structure and progressive disclosure |
| `git-guardrails` | `skills/misc/git-guardrails-claude-code` | PreToolUse hooks blocking dangerous git commands |
| `improve-codebase-architecture` | `skills/engineering/improve-codebase-architecture` | Find deepening opportunities — turn shallow modules into deep ones |
